addons.name: TR PDF Converter
addons.description: Native Trade Republic PDF parser — extracts cash, MMF, trading P&L, crypto (BTC/ETH/XRP/SOL with TR's pseudo-ISINs). Direct one-click import to Donkeyfolio activities (pick target account or auto-create TR account, extracts quantity + unit price + €1 fee for manual trades, €0 for savings plans). Crypto staking rewards classified as INTEREST + STAKING_REWARD subtype. Cash flows emit qty=1, unitPrice=amount per Donkeyfolio wizard convention. Supports DE/EN/PT TR statements. Format-aware number parsing (US & EU). Auto-recovery for broken rows. v2.7 adds WKN extraction, Yahoo-based stock-split detection, and a cash reconciliation panel. Ported from jcmpagel's open-source code.
addons.author: Donkeyfolio
addons.releaseNotes: v2.7.0: Three new verification & accuracy features. (1) WKN extraction — the German Wertpapierkennnummer is now pulled from each trade description and shown as a column in the Trading P&L table. WKNs also appear in import-failure samples (e.g. "US0080731088 (WKN A0MJX7): Quote currency required"), making it trivial to look the security up by its German ID when a mapping is wrong or missing. The lesson from v2.6.7's bad guesses: WKN unambiguously identifies the security where truncated PDF descriptions leave doubt. (2) Stock-split detection — opt-in 'Check for splits' button that queries Yahoo Finance's chart API for split events on every mapped Yahoo ticker, after each position's first trade date. Surfaces splits in a table (stock, ticker, WKN, split date, ratio, first trade) so the user knows exactly which SPLIT activities to add manually in Donkeyfolio. Solves the ServiceNow case (10.55 imported vs 21.56 in TR app — confirmed 2:1 split). 5-year lookback window, 300ms inter-call gap to respect Yahoo rate limits. (3) Cash reconciliation panel — pre-import, the addon now shows the PDF statement totals (opening / IN / OUT / closing), a per-activity-type breakdown of what we'll import (count + total + cash impact, +/- sign), and a verdict line: 'Statement Δ vs Activities Δ vs Gap'. When the gap is < €0.01 you're green. When it's not, the panel tells you what's likely wrong (parser dropped a row, or a TR Refund/Settlement/Rounding type isn't classified). v2.6.7: ticker map corrections after user verification (AVAV, DOCN, SOLST, MSTR, PNG.TO). v2.6.6: ISIN→ticker map (130+ entries) for live prices + logos. v2.6.5: defensive error coercion (Tauri IPC errors are strings). v2.6.4: critical fix — quoteCcy + instrumentType (was 0 imported / 3971 skipped). v2.6.3: account picker. v2.6.2: switch to single-create() per activity (bulk discards symbols).
